rows.finalText: "What is the next right step in my calling" is best read here through Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Ship (3) in Past sets the tone with movement away from the familiar broadens perspective. Here, Ship emphasizes movement, distance, trade, and the shift that comes once something leaves its old context. In Present, House (4) becomes the pivot, so the theme that stability and foundations become central turns into both pressure and opportunity. House often points to base structure, fixed conditions, and the foundations that have to hold before anything else can stretch in your calling.
